Copra Classics · Lunch
Kokoda
Local reef fish cured in fresh lime and coconut, served island-style with herbs and crisp vegetables
GF DF
FJD$26
Price
1×
Portions
15 min
Prep
30 min cure
Cook
Lunch
Service
Ingredients
IngredientUnitQty
Base
Local reef fish, skin off, dicedg150
Cure
Fresh lime juiceml80
Sea saltg3.0
Coconut
Fresh coconut creamml60
Vegetables
Cucumber, fine diceg30
Red onion, fine diceg20
Cherry tomato, halvedg30
Herbs
Fresh coriander, roughly choppedg5.0
Method
1
Dice reef fish into 1.5 cm cubes. Place in non-reactive bowl.
2
Cover with fresh lime juice and salt. Refrigerate 20–30 min until fish turns opaque.
3
Drain excess lime. Add coconut cream. Mix gently.
4
Fold in cucumber, red onion, cherry tomato, and coriander.
5
Season with salt and white pepper. Serve immediately.
Plating Notes
Serve in chilled bowl or half coconut shell. Coriander on top. Lime wedge on side.
Equipment
Non-reactive bowl · Refrigerator · Fine knife
Allergens
FISH
GLUTEN DAIRY EGGS TREE NUTS PEANUTS SHELLFISH SOY SESAME CELERY MUSTARD LUPIN MOLLUSCS SULPHITES
